title: Cobblemon Field Moves: Vaniron's Fork
description: Synchronize and Cute Charm out of battle effects.
body:
# About This Mod
This is a modified fork of the original [Cobblemon Field Moves](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-field-moves) mod created by TimInc.

## Why the fork?
I created this fork to be compatible with Cobblemon 1.7

## Features
### Synchronized natures
When player captures a pokemon, there's a higher chance it will have the same nature as a Pokemon **in first slot of his party** with the Synchronize ability.

### Charmed genders
When player captures a pokemon, there's a higher chance it will have the gender **opposite** to that of a Pokémon **in first slot of his party** with the Cute Charm ability.

## Credits & License
All credit for the original concept and foundation goes to TimInc. You can check out the original project [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-field-moves).

In accordance with the original project, this fork is published under the MIT License.
